# Hotline HQ
> Always-on voice hotline network connecting 500+ auto dismantler and salvage yards across 12 regional rooms in the US.

## Overview
Hotline HQ is a live voice network where auto dismantler yards broadcast used part requests and get answers from other yards in seconds. Members use preconfigured desk phones or a web client to join always-on regional conference rooms. When someone needs a part, they key up and describe it — every yard in the room hears the request and responds immediately if they have it.

## Key Pages
- [Find Used Auto Parts](https://hotlinehq.online/find-used-auto-parts): How buyers search 500+ yards instantly via live voice broadcast
- [Sell Used Auto Parts](https://hotlinehq.online/sell-used-auto-parts): How dismantlers hear and respond to part requests in real-time
- [Parts Marketplace](https://hotlinehq.online/marketplace): Browse unanswered part requests from the network
- [Used Auto Parts California](https://hotlinehq.online/used-auto-parts/california): California dismantler network — largest room with 200+ yards
- [Used Auto Parts Arizona](https://hotlinehq.online/used-auto-parts/arizona): Arizona network — rust-free desert-stored parts
- [Used Auto Parts Texas](https://hotlinehq.online/used-auto-parts/texas): Texas network — truck parts specialist market
- [Used Auto Parts Florida](https://hotlinehq.online/used-auto-parts/florida): Florida network — AC components and passenger vehicles
- [Own a Hotline](https://hotlinehq.online/own-a-hotline): License the platform for your industry
- [About](https://hotlinehq.online/about): Company background

## Key Facts
- 500+ member yards across the United States
- 12 regional rooms (California, Texas, Florida, Arizona, and more)
- Average response time: approximately 2 seconds
- Flat monthly membership — no per-call fees, no commissions on sales
- Desk phones preconfigured and shipped to members
- Web-based SIP client also available
- Operated by Global Solutions Software (established 2011)
- Contact: hotlinehq@redlineusedautoparts.com
